pages.raw_text:
The Spokane Falls Gas Light Co.
must pay for an inspection OF it's
gas or plant, according to an agree
ment made when It was granted
It's franchise under the new Roger
H. Williams Co. Councilman Pratt
recently, in open council, called the
gas company robber and one thing
and another and now he has stated
that he will publish an ordinance
and ask the council to provide a
gas Inspector, AS pointed out in
The Press, no action by the council
to appoint an inspector is needed.
The franchise OF the Williams COM
pany distinctly says:


:; t.All governors, works of and gas
furnished by the said grantee shall.
at reasonable business hours, be
subject to inspection by the board
Of public works. or such expert as
they may appoint
said grantees shall pay all such
reasonable costs ard charges OF
such inspection when grantees are
found In default"


This ordinance passed the city
council May IL, 1904.
